meta.title: Mustafa Aksu — Salesforce Developer
meta.description: Salesforce Developer building Apex, Lightning Web Components, Flows, and the integrations that scale with the business. Open to roles across the EU and remote.

home.headline: I build on the Salesforce platform.
home.subhead: Salesforce developer with deep Apex and integration expertise. 10 certifications across Platform, Industry Solutions, and Agentforce. Comfortable from Flow to async Apex.

about.title: About
about.lead: I'm a Salesforce developer who cares about both code quality and user adoption.
body: I build on the Salesforce platform end-to-end — Apex, Lightning Web Components, Flows, and the integrations that connect Salesforce to the rest of the business. I lean declarative-first and reach for Apex when it earns its place.

Integration is the part of the platform I love most. Eight of my Trailhead superbadges are Apex- and integration-focused (Advanced Apex, Apex Callouts, Inbound Integration, Named Credentials, Platform Events, Apex Web Services). My ten Salesforce certifications span Platform, Industry Solutions (OmniStudio, Industries CPQ), and Agentforce.
Outside of orgs, I read, lift, and travel. I'm currently based in Türkiye and open to roles across the EU, the DACH region, or remote.
